CustomField.description: Capacity in hours per month for this row (a per-developer row or a team-pool row). DECISION-G3 (2026-07-03): this is THE capacity number — the single source of truth all capacity surfaces read via DeliveryCapacityService. When set, it wins over WeeklyCapacityHoursNumber__c (weekly is derived as monthly × 12 / 52). Matches the TeamPool convention the seed row is derived from ("Delivery Team|Development|1000").
CustomField.label: Monthly Capacity Hours
